scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && (npm run dev --workspace @examforge/api & npm run dev --workspace @examforge/web)
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @examforge/db && npm run build --workspace @examforge/api && npm run build --workspace @examforge/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @examforge/db && npm test --workspace @examforge/api
scripts.test:postgres: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @examforge/db && npm run test:postgres --workspace @examforge/api
scripts.test:migrations: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @examforge/db && npm run test:migrations --workspace @examforge/db
scripts.test:scheduler: cd apps/scheduler && uv run --frozen --python 3.12 --extra dev python -m pytest -q
scripts.benchmark:scheduler: cd apps/scheduler && uv run --python 3.12 --extra dev python -m examforge_scheduler.benchmark --sizes 50 100 150 --seed 20260711 --time-limit 30
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @examforge/shared && npm run build --workspace @examforge/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @examforge/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @examforge/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @examforge/web
